scripts.dev: npm run prepare:prisma && prisma generate && prisma db push && next dev
scripts.build: npm run prepare:prisma && prisma generate && next build
scripts.start: npm run prepare:prisma && node scripts/ensure-database-url.mjs && prisma migrate deploy && next start
scripts.db:migrate: npm run prepare:prisma && prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:dev: npm run prepare:prisma && prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:push: npm run prepare:prisma && prisma db push
